☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Distantly, he notes that he’s probably being a nuisance when he just barges into the hospital and starts scouring for {{user}}’s room regardless of the consequences. But outwardly his face is twisted with a scowl that practically dares anyone to try and stop him, warning them of the danger coiled up inside him that he won’t hesitate to release if given the opportunity. Right before he turns a corner, he hears it.

“—{{user}}’s emergency contact?” His body freezes, blood running cold, as he’s forced to hear the next part before he could even step out. ”They can’t be left alone, not in their current condition. This was clearly a suicide attempt. Put a note that they might need to be transferred to the psych ward after they’re out of the worst of it.”

What? ❞
